name: Reflex Cat Meaty Treat Variety Pack
description: An assortment of REFLEX Cat Meaty Treats (5) - 100% natural, no artificial flavours, easily digestible due to high protein content and with fatty acids to support healthy skin and coat. Variety pack includes one each of these flavours: Chcken, Chicken & Cod, Salmon & Cod, Tuna and Tuna & Broccoli.
